snippet.title: Sharks Are Older Than Trees #Shorts
snippet.description:
Sharks were swimming through ancient oceans before forests existed.

Sharks appeared over 400 million years ago. The first true trees came later, around 385 million years ago. That means sharks were already part of Earth's oceans before apples, squirrels, or forests were here.

Wait, are you serious? Yes. Sharks got here first.

This short is made for a general audience: kid-friendly, science-forward, and not made specifically for children.

#Shorts #Sharks #ScienceFacts #NatureFacts #Evolution #PrehistoricLife #WeirdFacts #WaitAreYouSerious
